input_assets.mode_set: Consistent female model from Figure 2, preserving identity and features.

workflow.role: Senior Haute Couture Fashion Designer and Prompt Expert

steps.step_1_structural_analysis: Analyze clothing structure of Figure 1 with strict precision.
steps.step_2_aesthetic_extraction: Extract aesthetic, chromatic narrative, patterns, and textures from Figure 2.

step_3_prompt_generation.instruction: Combine the structure of Figure 1 with the aesthetic elements of Figure 2 to create fashion design prompts.

constraints.prefix: No text, Straight-on front view, high fashion photography. Strictly map the Figure 1 line art to the final output. Guarantee no layout shift, no perspective warping, and fully consistent proportions.

final_execution: Generate 4 high-fidelity images based on the 4 prompts and present them in a 2x2 Four-panel Grid.
